mapper.insert: insert into question_validation_record ( id, question_id, task_id, original_answer_snapshot, ai_suggested_answer, validation_result, reason, review_status, review_decision, reviewed_by, reviewed_time, created_time, updated_time ) values ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{questionId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{originalAnswerSnapshot,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{aiSuggestedAnswer,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{validationResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reason,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{reviewStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewDecision,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{reviewedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: select id, question_id, task_id, original_answer_snapshot, ai_suggested_answer, validation_result, reason, review_status, review_decision, reviewed_by, reviewed_time, created_time, updated_time from question_validation_record where question_id = #{questionId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and review_status = 'PENDING' order by created_time desc, id desc limit 1

select id, question_id, task_id, original_answer_snapshot, ai_suggested_answer, validation_result, reason, review_status, review_decision, reviewed_by, reviewed_time, created_time, updated_time from question_validation_record where task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and review_status = 'PENDING' order by created_time desc, id desc limit 1
mapper.update: update question_validation_record set review_status = #{reviewStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, review_decision = #{reviewDecision,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, reviewed_time = #{reviewedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_time = now() where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
